specializations: UV filters for hair fiber protection
product_highlights: Scalposine™ — breakthrough scalp microbiome modulator reducing sebum and promoting beneficial bacteria
UV protection actives for hair fiber
Comprehensive conditioning agent portfolio for diverse hair types
notes: BASF is one of the world's largest chemical companies with a comprehensive personal care division. Their Scalposine™ active ingredient is a breakthrough scalp microbiome modulator that reduces sebum production and encourages beneficial bacterial strains, addressing dandruff, itching, and hyperseborrhea. BASF's hair care portfolio also includes UV protection actives specifically designed for hair fiber protection, conditioning agents for diverse hair types, and a broad range of functional ingredients supported by extensive application expertise.
